rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmph. She's scared. Let's
start with her first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Lin, calm down. Remember the
battles we've fought so far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Have we ever faced something we couldn't
handle? It's okay. We're with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_SEL0011
rows.name:
Nod silently, indicating
you will definitely win.

rows.label: xs08110100_SEL0021
rows.name: Reach out your hand to run away together.

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0008
rows.name: I feel like I can do it if I'm with you all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0009
rows.name: Thank you. For doing that for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0010
rows.name:
But we can't run away. We
have to protect the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0011
rows.name: Sorry, I lost my head for a second.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0012
rows.name: I'm okay now. Let's take 'em down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmph. Looks like we've got someone bossy
here. She must be the commander, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08110100_MSG0014
rows.name: Hey Dagahn, take her down! Charge![ST:wait ]
